text:
Hello! I'm your Guesty Pro onboarding assistant. I'm here to help you build your account profile so that your upcoming Call 1 with your onboarding specialist, Jordan, is as tailored and productive as possible. 

To kick things off, could you please confirm:
1. Your business or account name
2. The primary country you operate in
3. How many active properties/listings you will be managing on Guesty

Looking forward to working through this with you!

args.note: User stated they do not know their primary country of operation. Jordan will need to clarify this on Call 1.

args.reason: User does not know their primary country of operation.
